usecase.name: [Sample App] Read Blog Post Detail
usecase.description: Click a blog post and verify detail page loads with content and related posts

steps.instruction: Navigate to the Blog page using the navigation bar
Click the first blog post card
Verify the blog post detail page loads with the post title as heading
Verify the author name and read time are displayed
Verify the post content paragraphs are visible
Verify a 'Related Posts' section exists at the bottom
Click the '← Back to Blog' link
Verify the blog list page is displayed again
